parsed.generic_mechanism: Coherent accumulation lets examples deepen a claim; reversed fragment ordering destroys causal and referential links, so locally competent sentences cannot produce chapter-level momentum.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A moves from shame through conditioning, acquired preference, social pressure, compulsive cycles, and failed restriction toward an upbeat instruction; concrete domestic and holiday examples sustain the argument, though repeated assurances create some drag.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B preserves vivid examples and individually readable sentences, but fragmentary reverse ordering makes answers precede questions, headings follow their material, references lose antecedents, and the chapter terminates in opening apparatus rather than a conclusion.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: B preserves vivid examples and individually readable sentences, but fragmentary reverse ordering makes answers precede questions, headings follow their material, references lose antecedents, and the chapter terminates in opening apparatus rather than a conclusion.
